entities.name: Lifecycle
entities.context: Organizational framework with Staging, Active, and Archive phases

entities.name: Staging
entities.context: Lifecycle phase for temporary, unprocessed content

entities.name: Active
entities.context: Lifecycle phase for current, in-use content

entities.name: registry.jsonl
entities.context: Registry file in each list directory for discoverability

relationships.context: Staging lifecycle phase stores content in Records/
Active lifecycle phase uses Lists/ directory
Active lifecycle phase uses Knowledge/ directory
Archive lifecycle phase stores content in Documents/Archive/
Staging is a phase within the Lifecycle framework
Active is a phase within the Lifecycle framework
Archive is a phase within the Lifecycle framework
Registry pattern implemented via registry.jsonl in list directories
